title: Crafter's Rotting Throne
description:
A large assortment of mods encompassing Create, Mahou Tsukai, Apothesis, Combat, Mob, Occultism, and Ars Nouveau, along with several compat and Create addition mods.

Made for friends, but you may find enjoyment.
body:
A Magically industrious pack to suit your world's needs.

Containing many large mods, such as:
Create
Ars Nouveau
Occultism
Mahou Tsukai, and more.

I Still often maintain, and update the pack with configurations, and compatibility mods, as many are easily broken without.

It's a collection of both Factory-like and magical mods to suit any type of player, primarily aimed at my friends. However, if you come across this, i hope you enjoy.

Modifying it may or may not cause issues, do so at your own risk.

_Play on hard mode for the best experience._
